column1: # 安塔蘭人威嚇訊息(ANTARMSG.LBX,loadFile,英文 8 則)。英文原文即 key。完整翻譯。
We the Antarans have come to extinguish you from this galaxy!
column2: 我等安塔蘭人前來將你們從這個銀河抹除!

column1: You have been found unfit to exist within the same galaxy as the mighty Antarans.
column2: 你們被判定不配與強大的安塔蘭人共存於同一個銀河。

column1: We have come to erradicate all life forms from this galaxy. You cannot stand against us.
column2: 我等前來根除這個銀河的所有生命形式。你們無法與我等抗衡。

column1: This galaxy will be cleansed of all inferior life forms. And indeed, all beings are inferior to the beautiful Antarans!
column2: 這個銀河將清除所有低等生命形式。而事實上,一切存在都低於美麗的安塔蘭人!

column1: We have returned to continue our purification of this galaxy.
column2: 我等已歸來,繼續對這個銀河的淨化。

column1: You continue to stand in the way of the Antaran Empire. You may not surrender, you cannot win, your only option is death.
column2: 你們仍擋在安塔蘭帝國的道路上。你們不得投降,也無法獲勝,唯一的選擇是死亡。

column1: It is again your turn to be crushed beneath the great force that is the Antaran army.
column2: 又輪到你們被安塔蘭大軍的強大力量碾碎了。

column1: All your petty squabbling with the other beings in this galaxy are meaningless. The Antaran fleet will destroy you all, one by one.
column2: 你們與這個銀河其他存在的瑣碎爭鬥毫無意義。安塔蘭艦隊將把你們逐一消滅。
